title: Old West Weaponry
description: An old west mod that adds a shotgun, revolver, rifle, and  a flintlock.
body:
**Old West Weaponry has lots of guns and weapons**. this includes :

Sharps Rifle (with shoot and reload animation and can zoom in)

Coach Shotgun (with shoot and reload animation)

Revolver (with shoot animation and can zoom in)

Flintlock (with shoot and reload animation)

Dynamite (when the projectile hits a block it bounces then explodes)

Brown Cowboy Hat

White Cowboy Hat

Black Cowboy Hat

**All guns use the same ammo for convenience.**

Special features :

Sharps Rifle when hits an entity it gives it bleeding which deals damage over time until death, unless the player uses bandages to stop the bleeding

The Coach Shotgun bullets spray

The Revolver shoots faster when it is not zoomed in

The Flintlock launches you in the air from the recoil
When the dynamite hits a block it bounces then explodes

[My YT](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHBxliTPkVU_wT-_bfHv-pQ)
